projects.title: Learning To Fly
projects.description: Visualizes data taken from flights coming in and going out of Midway and Ohare airports.

projects.title: Yelp Scraper
projects.description: Scrapes data from restaurants on yelp and writes them to a CSV file.

projects.title: Automatic Grader
projects.description: Takes essays written by non-native speakers of English and tries to predict the grade (high, medium, low) quality of their prose. The project uses NLTK to analyze aspects of their writing

projects.title: YelpCamp
projects.description: A mock version of Yelp made specifically for storing different campgrounds. Users can register and login to submit their own campgrounds or leave comments on previously posted campgrounds.
